programs.title: Animal Genius: Teamwork
programs.desc: Liz Bonnin travels to Africa's Kalahari Desert to witness the teamwork of meerkats and to the beaches of Mexico as sea turtles hatch in unison.

programs.title: Savage Kingdom
programs.desc: Sekekama is forced to lead his family into hostile territory; his gamble leads him into a bloody contest against old rivals and new, but it is his control over one treacherous son that will determine Sekekama's hold on power.

programs.title: Savage Kingdom
programs.desc: Sekekama struggles to suppress the rebellion of his three sons and protect his kingdom; Zalika, Queen of the Army of Shadows raises new troops to prepare for her moment of triumph; the vagabond Pale Pack fights for survival.

programs.title: Savage Kingdom
programs.desc: Neo must prepare for life as a solitary assassin, but his future hangs in the balance after his mother gets forced to fight for their fortress and becomes seriously injured.

programs.title: Savage Kingdom
programs.desc: Sekekama fights to defend his pride from his treacherous sons as the dry season takes hold.

programs.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programs.desc: Confronting venom and brutal heat as snakes seek shelter in all the wrong places.
